default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and assign tasks for creating Auth0 artifacts and outbound kits for B2B SaaS vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Timmy to create B2B SaaS artifacts (company context, target personas) for Auth0 by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [15 outbound kits (formerly "prospecting resources") need intelligence reports added from Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Sydney to send relevant B2B SaaS files and resources to Timmy for artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [New pipeline in Atlas may be useful for generating artifacts, but needs testing for vertical-specific control](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Topics

### Artifact Creation Process

  - [Two main artifacts needed per vertical: company context and target personas](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Content changes based on vertical (e.g. retail focuses on personalization, healthcare on compliance)](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Use Claude AI to generate artifacts, feeding it specific context and resources](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Remove branding/extra info from source docs to optimize Claude's processing](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [B2B SaaS resources: application primer, landing page, case studies, identity challenges doc](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Outbound Kits Update

  - [15 accounts in retail vertical need intelligence reports added from Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Recently renamed from "prospecting resources" to "outbound kits"](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Timmy to add intelligence reports by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### Project Management

  - [This week's focus: FinServ and B2B SaaS verticals](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Next week: FinServ and HealthTech](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Sydney considering internal research instead of waiting for Auth0 data](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [New Atlas pipeline may help create artifacts, but needs testing for vertical specificity](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Discussion on Cloud account usage and messaging allocation](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Tips on efficiently feeding information to Claude AI for better results](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Importance of giving specific context to AI for vertical-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Timmy to create B2B SaaS artifacts (company context, target personas) by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Timmy to add intelligence reports to 15 outbound kits by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Sydney to send relevant B2B SaaS files and resources to Timmy](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Sydney to align team on tasks via internal channel message](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Consider testing new Atlas pipeline for artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/7a5yzy5DytWJEqUKjgggaC73DueaexJn?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

action_items.description: Add intelligence reports for 15 retail accounts to shared outbound kits doc. Due Friday.
Create B2B SaaS artifacts for Auth0 (company context + target personas). Deliver before Wed call. Use provided resources, clean PDFs for project knowledge.
Send B2B SaaS reference files to Oluwatimilehin (incl. cleaned PDF)
Send msg to internal channel re: current work assignments
